remarks:
Japan Minamata: 
1. On 26th Jan, Fiber Optic Cable failure occurred from PCS5 & PCS6 to GSS. Due to this, Inv-05 & 06 were in off condition from 26th Jan to 04th Feb. Generation loss: 163 MWh and Revenue Loss $ 38,795. 

2. On 7th Feb 2025, PCS3 tripped due to low insulation resistance from 15:30 hrs to 17:48 Hrs. Gen Loss: 0.719 MWh. Revenue Loss: $ 174 . 

3. On 12th Feb 2025, PCS6 tripped due to low insulation resistance from 12:27 Hrs and 13:38 Hrs. Gen Loss: 0.388 MWh and Revenue Loss:  $ 93.53.

4. On 26th Feb, PCS1, PCS2, and PCS3, and on 27th Feb, PCS4, PCS5, and PCS6 were in software updating mode by the Sun grow team for 03:48 hours (average) for each inverter. After the software update, all the inverters came into operation mode. Generation Loss: 49.98 MWh and Revenue Loss: $ 12,054.

5. Curtailment Details: 
     a) Budgeted: 16.08% (2527 MWh)
     b) Actual: 18.06% (2839 MWh)
     c) Excess Curtailment: 1.99% (312 MWh)

6. Inverter failures due to low insulation resistance and other faults from Jan-25 to June-25: 781 MWh and Revenue Loss: $ 193,995. 

7. String failure loss due to typhoon damage. Gen Loss: 2516 MWh from Jan-25 to June-25. Revenue Loss: $ 624,979. 

Korea Blackwood: 

1. Asset No.15:  
a.  104.475 kWp capacity of faulty solar modules due to insulation failure, crack & Hotspot are removed to resume the inverters generation. Need to replace the solar modules to resume the generation.  Generation loss: 58 MWh and Revenue Loss: $ 4,473. 

b. Blackwood agreed to replace the damaged modules and vendor finalization is under progress. 

2. Asset No. 28: Due to BESS fire incident, 10 Nos of strings near BESS station are damaged. Need to rectify the same to resume the generation.  Gen Loss: 28 MWh and Revenue Loss:  $ 2,216. 

Korea Iceberg

Asset No.15: Fire incident happened in the month of Oct-2024 and all the inverters are damaged. Spares inverters are not available to replace.   Response, repair and restoration time is too high for OCI make inverters, they are yet to repair and restore the generation at TOP Infra Electric solar site (384KW). There is a partial discharge in the spacer after checking the transformer. Spacer will be replaced.

Asset No.26: Remote monitoring portals are accessible only in Korea but Peak Energy Technical centre does not have access. E.g. Namjeong floating solar (26MW).

1. Grid curtailment is a major concern for Minamata site. 25.55% of curtailment is recorded in Jan-25. It is 13.07% higher than the budgeted curtailment of 12.48%. 
     a) Grid Curtailment is set by Utility and it is uncontrollable. 

2. Module damages due to typhoon is causing generation loss, approximately 200 strings are    down due to damages.
a) To reduce the number of string failures, rearrangement of solar modules being done.
b) Rectification process initiated and is in the stage of selection of suitable solar modules to replace the existing damaged modules. 

3. Poor response & visibility of site operation from the site team. Working on to resolve the issue and improve the response. 

4. On 26th Jan, Fiber Optic Cable failure occurred from PCS5 & PCS6 to GSS. Due to this, Inv-05 & 06 were in off condition from 26th Jan to 04th Feb. 
    a) At present, the generation is resumed by connecting spare cable. Existing damaged cable need to be repaired. 
    (Generation loss: -111.17 MWh   and Revenue Loss $ 26,414).

     a) Budgeted: 12.48% (252 MWh)
     b) Actual: 25.55% (515 MWh)
